creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168729
Revised patch for X11 OPTION

Ben, your first patch does not build successfully without the X11 OPTION. This adds an ugly hack to make it compile.

In any case, I would like to turn fdk-aac into a non-default OPTION. For people building the port themselves and accepting license consequences, we should not just take away the best aac codec we currently have.
